  "findings": [
    "Grounding clamp is not listed for direct burial or concrete encasement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the non-compliant clamp with a grounding connector listed for direct burial (such as a DB-rated clamp or exothermic weld) before backfilling."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.70 requires that grounding clamps and fittings used for direct burial or concrete encasement must be listed for such use. Installing a standard clamp in a direct-burial application will lead to corrosion and failure of the grounding electrode connection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.70",
    "NEC 250.68"
  ]
}
